log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Loxodon — Armored Escapist (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!

══ ROUND 3 ══

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
